title: The Secret of Moon's Water!

scenes.text: Scientists found water on the Moon's surface.
People think the Moon is completely dry.
scenes.label: Moon Is Waterless

scenes.text: Recent missions confirm water ice exists in permanently shadowed craters.
scenes.label: Ice Found in Craters

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: Learn about the significant discovery of water on the Moon and its implications for future missions. Follow for daily science!
